verse_text: And suddenly great tempest arose on the sea, so that the boat was covered with the waves. But He was asleep.

links.context: , 7 God uses the random winter storms and the rain and snow to show man his weakness in the face of God's overwhelming power. Indeed, Christ taught this lesson to His disciples when he calmed the storm ([[MAT.8:23]]-27). "He has created man to be weak, and yet man thinks himself to be strong; and thereby he becomes even more feeble" (JohnChr).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Christ and His disciples had a very similar experience on a boat in a storm (see text and note at [[MAT.8:24]]-26).

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
